name: Bug Signal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光虫信号</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バグ・シグナル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Insect Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 Insect monster that is 2 Ranks higher or lower than that monster you control, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to that target also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Bug Signal" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Insect Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 Insect monster that is 2 Ranks higher or lower than that monster you control, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to that target also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.) You can only activate 1 "Bug Signal" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
